name: Greg Murphy
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $218,267 for Greg Murphy in U.S. House, NC-03. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
